properties.name: East Texas Smackover Formation Lithium Brine Trend
properties.description: Representative point for the Texas portion of the Smackover lithium brine trend, an emerging focus for direct lithium extraction from subsurface brines.
properties.sourceName: Bureau of Economic Geology - The Texas Imperative
properties.notes: Regional trend centroid; not a project boundary or facility point. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Smackover Lithium Franklin Project Brine Resource Area
properties.county: Franklin, West Titus, and East Hopkins counties
properties.operator: Smackover Lithium JV / Standard Lithium / Equinor
properties.description: Representative point for the Franklin Project area, where Smackover Lithium reported a maiden inferred brine resource and high-grade lithium brine results.
properties.sourceName: Standard Lithium - Franklin Project inferred resource release
properties.notes: Project-area point based on public county-level project description; not an exact lease polygon. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Pine Forest 1 Lithium Brine Sample Well Area
properties.description: Representative point for the Pine Forest 1 brine sample area, associated with a reported 806 mg/L lithium brine sample in the Franklin Project area.
properties.sourceName: Standard Lithium - East Texas Project
properties.notes: Public sources describe the well as within the project/western area but do not publish an official wellhead coordinate; placed as a representative Franklin County project-area point. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: West Titus County Smackover Leasing Area
properties.operator: Smackover Lithium JV and other operators
properties.description: Representative point for West Titus County brine and brine-sourced mineral leasing associated with the Franklin Project area.
properties.sourceName: Standard Lithium - Franklin Project inferred resource release
properties.notes: County-level representative point within the publicly described West Titus project area. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: East Hopkins County Smackover Leasing Area
properties.operator: Smackover Lithium JV and other operators
properties.description: Representative point for East Hopkins County brine and brine-sourced mineral leasing associated with the Franklin Project area.
properties.sourceName: Standard Lithium - Franklin Project inferred resource release
properties.notes: County-level representative point within the publicly described East Hopkins project area. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: Cass County Smackover Brine Prospect Area
properties.description: Representative point for Cass County lithium brine prospectivity in the East Texas Smackover trend.
properties.sourceName: Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas - Old oil fields reimagined as lithium sources
properties.notes: Prospect-area point; included to show the broader northeast Texas Smackover trend beyond the Franklin Project. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Morris County Smackover Brine Prospect Area
properties.description: Representative point for Morris County lithium brine prospectivity in the East Texas Smackover trend.
properties.sourceName: Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas - Old oil fields reimagined as lithium sources
properties.notes: Prospect-area point; included as a broad educational brine-trend record, not a confirmed producing project. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Anderson County Southern Smackover Prospect Area
properties.description: Representative point for the southern East Texas Smackover brine trend where lithium interest may extend beyond the main Franklin/Titus/Hopkins area.
properties.sourceName: Bureau of Economic Geology - The Texas Imperative
properties.notes: Very broad representative point; should be treated as a regional prospectivity marker, not a defined project. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Cherokee County Southern Smackover Prospect Area
properties.description: Representative point for southern East Texas Smackover-related lithium brine prospectivity.
properties.sourceName: Bureau of Economic Geology - The Texas Imperative
properties.notes: Very broad representative point; included to show possible Smackover extension in East Texas. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: T5 Smackover Partners Geothermal-Lithium Project Area
properties.description: Representative point for T5 Smackover Partners integrated geothermal, lithium, and critical-minerals project announced for Franklin, Titus, and Hopkins counties.
properties.sourceName: T5 Smackover Partners - East Texas geothermal/lithium project
properties.notes: Project-area centroid across the announced county group; not a plant site or lease boundary. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: Chevron Northeast Texas Smackover Leasehold
properties.description: Representative point for Chevron leasehold acreage targeting lithium in Smackover brines in northeast Texas and southwest Arkansas.
properties.sourceName: Reuters - Chevron enters U.S. lithium sector with acreage buy
properties.notes: Acreage position spans multiple areas and a state line; point is a northeast Texas representative marker only. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: EnergyX Texas Smackover Lease Position
properties.description: Representative point for EnergyX Texas Smackover acreage position tied to Project Lonestar and planned downstream lithium processing in northeast Texas.
properties.sourceName: EnergyX - Smackover lithium mineral deposit acquisition
properties.notes: Regional lease-position point; not an exact lease boundary. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: TerraVolta Project Freebird Appraisal Area
properties.description: Representative point for TerraVolta Project Freebird, described by the company as a Central/East Texas appraisal project in the Smackover lithium context.
properties.sourceName: TerraVolta - Operations
properties.notes: Company does not publish a precise project coordinate on the operations page; point is intentionally generalized. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: TerraVolta East Texas Smackover TBA Project Area
properties.description: Representative point for TerraVolta East Texas Smackover project activity listed as TBA on the company operations page.
properties.sourceName: TerraVolta - Operations
properties.notes: Highly generalized because public source provides only broad East Texas location. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: EnergyX Project Lonestar Demonstration Plant at TexAmericas Center
properties.description: Direct lithium extraction demonstration plant at TexAmericas Center near Texarkana/Hooks, Texas, intended to demonstrate Smackover brine-to-lithium production.
properties.sourceName: EnergyX - Project Lonestar site at TexAmericas Center
properties.notes: Coordinates use TexAmericas Center published latitude/longitude. Facility footprint may occupy a smaller parcel within the industrial center. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: EnergyX Project Lonestar Mega Refinery Site near Red River Army Depot
properties.description: Representative point for EnergyX planned larger refinery site near the Red River Army Depot associated with Project Lonestar.
properties.sourceName: EnergyX - Smackover lithium mineral deposit acquisition
properties.notes: Public source describes rights to land near Red River Army Depot, but not a parcel centroid; coordinate is a nearby representative point. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: Element3 Permian Basin Lithium Extraction and Carbonate Facility
properties.description: Lithium extraction and carbonate facility in Midland County using Permian Basin oilfield wastewater / produced water as feedstock.
properties.sourceName: Office of the Texas Governor - Element3 lithium extraction facility ribbon cutting
properties.notes: Placed near the public 6712 FM 715 address reference; treated as approximate facility point rather than official plant boundary. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: Element3 / Double Eagle Midland Basin Produced-Water Field Test Site
properties.description: Representative point for Element3 battery-grade lithium carbonate field test using Midland Basin produced water at a Double Eagle subsidiary recycling facility.
properties.sourceName: Element3 - Battery-grade lithium carbonate from Permian Basin wastewater
properties.notes: Public release does not identify the recycling facility coordinate; placed as a Midland Basin test-area marker. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: LibertyStream Reeves County DLE Demonstration Unit
properties.description: Representative point for LibertyStream Reeves County field operations producing lithium carbonate from oilfield brine / produced water.
properties.sourceName: Midland Reporter-Telegram - LibertyStream Reeves County lithium carbonate production
properties.notes: The report identifies Reeves County field operations but not an exact well/site coordinate; point is county-level representative. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: Select / LibertyStream Howard County Lithium Carbonate Facility
properties.operator: Select Water Solutions / LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners
properties.description: First commercial lithium carbonate facility planned at a Select operating site in Howard County north of Midland.
properties.sourceName: Select Water Solutions / LibertyStream partnership release
properties.notes: County-level representative point north of Midland; exact Select operating-site coordinates were not published in the source. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: LibertyStream Martin County Planned Midland Basin Facility
properties.operator: Select Water Solutions / LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners
properties.description: Representative point for planned future lithium carbonate deployment across existing Select sites in the Midland Basin, including Martin County.
properties.sourceName: Midland Reporter-Telegram - LibertyStream Howard County lithium facility
properties.notes: Represents a planned county-level buildout area rather than a confirmed plant coordinate. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: LibertyStream Midland County Planned Midland Basin Facility
properties.operator: Select Water Solutions / LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners
properties.description: Representative point for planned future lithium carbonate deployment across existing Select sites in the Midland Basin, including Midland County.
properties.sourceName: Midland Reporter-Telegram - LibertyStream Howard County lithium facility
properties.notes: Represents a planned county-level buildout area rather than a confirmed plant coordinate. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: LibertyStream Upton County Planned Midland Basin Facility
properties.operator: Select Water Solutions / LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners
properties.description: Representative point for planned future lithium carbonate deployment across existing Select sites in the Midland Basin, including Upton County.
properties.sourceName: Midland Reporter-Telegram - LibertyStream Howard County lithium facility
properties.notes: Represents a planned county-level buildout area rather than a confirmed plant coordinate. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: LibertyStream Glasscock County Planned Midland Basin Facility
properties.operator: Select Water Solutions / LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners
properties.description: Representative point for planned future lithium carbonate deployment across existing Select sites in the Midland Basin, including Glasscock County.
properties.sourceName: Midland Reporter-Telegram - LibertyStream Howard County lithium facility
properties.notes: Represents a planned county-level buildout area rather than a confirmed plant coordinate. Broad filter category: facility.

properties.name: Midland Basin Produced-Water Lithium Opportunity
properties.county: Midland, Martin, Howard, Upton, Glasscock and surrounding counties
properties.description: Representative point for lithium recovery potential from large-volume Midland Basin produced water streams.
properties.sourceName: Bureau of Economic Geology - Critical Minerals and Rare Earth Elements in Texas
properties.notes: Produced-water opportunity area; not an extraction facility. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Delaware Basin Produced-Water Lithium Opportunity
properties.county: Reeves, Loving, Ward, Winkler and surrounding counties
properties.description: Representative point for lithium recovery potential from Delaware Basin produced water streams and saltwater disposal infrastructure.
properties.sourceName: U.S. Geological Survey - Oil and Gas Waters Project
properties.notes: Produced-water opportunity area; not an extraction facility. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Central Basin Platform Oilfield Brine Lithium Opportunity
properties.county: Andrews, Ector, Winkler and surrounding counties
properties.description: Representative point for potential oilfield-brine lithium recovery from the Central Basin Platform and adjacent Permian produced-water systems.
properties.sourceName: Environmental Science: Water Research & Technology - Lithium recovery from U.S. oil and gas produced waters
properties.notes: Generalized oilfield-brine opportunity marker. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Permian Basin High-Volume Produced-Water Recovery Area
properties.description: Representative point for Permian Basin high-volume produced-water systems that may support lithium and critical-mineral recovery if economics and technology allow.
properties.sourceName: Bureau of Economic Geology - Critical Minerals and Rare Earth Elements in Texas
properties.notes: Regional produced-water marker; included to distinguish very high water volume from necessarily high lithium concentration. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Barnett Shale Produced-Water Lithium Sampling Area
properties.county: Tarrant, Wise, Denton, Johnson and surrounding counties
properties.operator: Bureau of Economic Geology / research partners
properties.description: Representative point for Barnett Shale produced-water sampling referenced in lithium extraction research and BEG-related work.
properties.sourceName: Journal of Petroleum Technology / BEG - Lithium extraction produced water sampling
properties.notes: Regional research/sampling marker, not a facility. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: Texas Gulf Coast Oilfield Brine Lithium Study Area
properties.description: Representative point for Texas Gulf Coast oilfield brines included in research on controls of lithium content in oilfield waters.
properties.sourceName: Applied Geochemistry - Controls on lithium content of oilfield waters in Texas and U.S. Gulf Coast
properties.notes: Regional study-area marker for research context, not a specific project or facility. Broad filter category: exploration.

properties.name: Reeves County Saltwater Disposal Lithium Recovery Opportunity
properties.description: Representative point for saltwater disposal and produced-water systems in Reeves County that are being evaluated as potential DLE feedstock sources.
properties.sourceName: Midland Reporter-Telegram - LibertyStream Reeves County lithium carbonate production
properties.notes: County-level opportunity marker; not a specific SWD well coordinate. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Howard County Produced-Water Lithium Recovery Opportunity
properties.operator: Select Water Solutions / LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners and other operators
properties.description: Representative point for Howard County produced-water lithium recovery opportunity tied to Select and LibertyStream commercial planning.
properties.sourceName: Select Water Solutions / LibertyStream partnership release
properties.notes: County-level opportunity marker; not an exact plant or pipeline point. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Round Top Lithium-Bearing Critical Minerals Deposit
properties.operator: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. / project partners
properties.description: Round Top is primarily a rare earth and critical-minerals project but is also described as containing lithium among other technology metals.
properties.sourceName: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. - Round Top Mountain project
properties.notes: Coordinates use published Round Top summit/project-area coordinates; not a mine boundary. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Little Round Top Lithium-Bearing Prospect Area
properties.description: Adjacent Little Round Top prospect area included as part of the broader Sierra Blanca / Round Top critical-minerals context.
properties.sourceName: TopoZone - Little Round Top, Hudspeth County, Texas
properties.notes: Prospect/summit coordinate; lithium relevance is secondary to broader critical-minerals context. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Sierra Blanca Peaks Lithium-Bearing Critical Minerals District
properties.description: Representative district point for the Sierra Blanca peaks and Round Top-area lithium-bearing critical-minerals context.
properties.sourceName: TopoZone - Round Top, Hudspeth County, Texas
properties.notes: District marker; overlaps conceptually with Round Top but useful for atlas-scale critical-minerals context. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Round Top State Mineral Lease Area
properties.operator: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. / State of Texas lease interests
properties.description: Representative point for the leased Round Top critical-minerals project area, which includes lithium among a broader suite of technology metals.
properties.sourceName: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. - Round Top Mountain project
properties.notes: Lease-area marker; project page describes 950-acre leases and adjacent prospecting permits, but not a GIS polygon. Broad filter category: deposit.

properties.name: Baringer Hill Historical Lithium-Bearing Pegmatite
properties.description: Historic Baringer Hill pegmatite locality, now beneath Lake Buchanan, included for lithium-bearing mineral history and rare-element context.
properties.sourceName: Mindat - Baringer Hill Mine, Llano County, Texas
properties.notes: Coordinates from Mindat locality map; site is historical/inundated and not accessible as a modern mine. Broad filter category: historical site.

properties.name: Tesla Lithium Refinery - La Paloma-Lost Creek / Robstown
properties.description: Tesla lithium refinery site near Corpus Christi and Robstown in the La Paloma-Lost Creek area of Nueces County.
properties.sourceName: Mapcarta / OpenStreetMap - Tesla Lithium Refinery
properties.notes: Mapcarta/OpenStreetMap lists the refinery at 4518 County Road 28, Robstown, Texas with coordinates 27.70966, -97.72878. Tesla official project materials describe the refinery project near Corpus Christi; this point represents the mapped facility location, not a legal boundary.
